narrative:
Vienna Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 803 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
